brain.commentary: The majority of the council's signals are flat with negative composites and alphas, especially on the large‑cap tech names (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, AMZN). Only TSLA, META, QQQ and DIA carry a clear long bias and positive alpha. Given the preponderance of weak or fragile flat signals, we keep a neutral overall stance but trim exposure slightly. Convictions are nudged down on the fragile flat positions and nudged up on the few strong long ideas.

decisions.reason: IV-rank 32% too low to sell premium

workforce.mandate: Routes orders to Alpaca paper / sim
